query:
-- 查询所有产品及其批次数量、图片状态
SELECT 
  p.id as product_id,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.sku,
  p.imageUrl,
  p.erpCompanyId,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pv.id) as variant_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pi.id) as image_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON pi.productId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sku, p.imageUrl, p.erpCompanyId
ORDER BY p.id;

-- 查询所有产品及其批次数量、图片状态
SELECT 
  p.id as product_id,
  p.name as product_name,
  p.sku,
  p.imageUrl,
  p.erpCompanyId,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pv.id) as variant_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pi.id) as image_count
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON pi.productId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sku, p.imageUrl, p.erpCompanyId
ORDER BY p.id;
